name: Mango Apricot Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the apricots and mangoes with water in a large pot. If needed, add more water to achieve desired consistency.
2. Measure an equal amount of sugar (you can experiment with honey or other suitable cooking sugar substitutes) and stir into the mixture.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
4. Cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally until thickened.
